responsibilities: Develop and maintain construction schedules using Primavera P6 to track project milestones and critical path activities
Review and respond to requests for information (RFIs) and submittals to ensure design compliance and project continuity
Conduct daily site inspections to verify construction quality, safety compliance, and adherence to approved drawings
Prepare cost estimates and track project budgets to identify variances and support change order negotiations
Coordinate with subcontractors, suppliers, and project stakeholders to resolve field issues and maintain project timelines
Administer construction contracts and document project progress through daily reports, photos, and meeting minutes
Implement safety programs and conduct toolbox talks to ensure OSHA compliance across the construction site
Collaborate with design engineers and architects to resolve constructability issues and minimize project delays
